basic_details.job_title: ICAR NIPB Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR-National Institute for Plant Biotechnology (NIPB), New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-NIPB is recruiting 1 Junior Research Fellow post with relevant Post Graduate qualification. Walk-in Interview on 20 July 2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of interview. | Essential Qualifications | Post graduate degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics/Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/Life Science with NET Qualified OR Post Graduate Degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics/Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/Life Science or relevant subjects OR Bachelors' degree in relevant subjects with four years Bachelors’ degree or Post Graduate degree in professional courses selected through National Eligibility Test (CSIR, UGC-NET, GATE) or national level exams conducted by Central government departments/agencies (DST, DBT, DAE, etc.). | Desirable Qualifications Relevant experience in pathogen handling, plant breeding, field trials, molecular biology, Bioinformatics tools, and techniques like next generation sequencing. | Age Limit (as on date of interview, per ICAR guidelines) | Male: 35 years Female: 40 years | Application Fee: Nil

how_to_apply: Interested candidates may attend the Walk-In-Interview with 2 copies of Application form along with 2 self-attested copies of all documents. Candidates must bring all Original documents for verification.
They may also send the application form along with clubbed documents in a single PDF to [email protected] (mention Advertisement number in subject).
All educational certificates/mark sheets (10th to PG/PhD)
Venue: LBS Building, Pusa Campus, New Delhi – 110012
important_instructions: Positions are purely temporary/contractual with no claim for regular employment in ICAR. No TA/DA will be provided. Candidates must report at least 60 minutes early. Incomplete applications or missing documents will lead to cancellation. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-NIPB Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ICAR-NIPB is recruiting 1 Junior Research Fellow post with relevant Post Graduate qualification. Walk-in Interview on 20 July 2026.

rows.icar_national_institute_for_plant_biotec: Identification and characterization of powdery mildew (Erysiphe cruciferarum) resistance using existing and novel mutant population of Indian mustard (Brassica juncea)
One year from the date of appointment (extendable based on performance)
LBS Building, Pusa Campus, New Delhi-110012

content_sections.heading: ICAR-NIPB Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
ICAR-NIPB Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
ICAR-NIPB Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of interview. Essential Qualifications Post graduate degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics/Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/Life Science with NET Qualified OR Post Graduate Degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics/Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/Life Science or relevant subjects OR Bachelors' degree in relevant subjects with four years Bachelors’ degree or Post Graduate degree in professional courses selected through National Eligibility Test (CSIR, UGC-NET, GATE) or national level exams conducted by Central government departments/agencies (DST, DBT, DAE, etc.). Desirable Qualifications Relevant experience in pathogen handling, plant breeding, field trials, molecular biology, Bioinformatics tools, and techniques like next generation sequencing. Age Limit (as on date of interview, per ICAR guidelines) Male: 35 years Female: 40 years Application Fee: Nil

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICAR-NIPB Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates may attend the Walk-In-Interview with 2 copies of Application form along with 2 self-attested copies of all documents. Candidates must bring all Original documents for verification. Documents Required (Original + 2 self-attested copies): Application form in prescribed format Complete CV All educational certificates/mark sheets (10th to PG/PhD) Experience certificates & NOC (if employed) Category certificate, publications, etc. Venue: LBS Building, Pusa Campus, New Delhi – 110012

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ICAR-NIPB JRF Candidates
content_sections.text: Positions are purely temporary/contractual with no claim for regular employment in ICAR. No TA/DA will be provided. Candidates must report at least 60 minutes early. Incomplete applications or missing documents will lead to cancellation. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICAR NIPB JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 20 July 2026. Candidates should send documents by email prior to the date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary of Junior Research Fellow at ICAR NIPB?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA for the first two years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for ICAR NIPB JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Post Graduate in Plant Breeding, Genetics, Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, Life Science with NET/GATE or equivalent national level qualification.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are there in ICAR NIPB JRF 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for Junior Research Fellow under the powdery mildew resistance project.

faq.question: Q5. Is NET mandatory for ICAR NIPB Junior Research Fellow?
faq.answer: Yes, NET qualification is required for Post Graduate candidates unless selected through other specified national level exams.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for ICAR NIPB JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Upper age limit is 35 years for males and 40 years for females as per ICAR guidelines.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for ICAR National Institute for Plant Biotechnology JRF?
faq.answer: Attend walk-in interview on 20.07.2026 with all original documents and application form. Email option is also available.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project title for ICAR NIPB JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: "Identification and characterization of powdery mildew (Erysiphe cruciferarum) resistance using existing and novel mutant population of Indian mustard (Brassica juncea)."

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for ICAR NIPB JRF 2026?
